title: schaueria litoralis
intro: Schaueria litoralis, also known as beach schaueria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is said to have medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. It is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms such as pain and swelling, as well as protect against cell damage and promote overall health. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be obtained by drying the leaves and roots of the plant.
